mapper.select: /* selectSurveyDateInfo */ SELECT srvy_bgng_dt, srvy_end_dt, srvy_stts, CASE WHEN CURDATE() < srvy_bgng_dt THEN 'BEFORE' WHEN CURDATE() > srvy_end_dt THEN 'CLOSED' ELSE 'PROG' END AS date_stat FROM ${schema}.srvy WHERE srvy_oid = #{srvyOid}

/* selectUserSurveyQstList */ SELECT q.srvy_qitem_oid, q.srvy_oid, q.up_srvy_qitem_oid, q.srvy_qitem_seq , q.srvy_qitem_ttl, q.srvy_qitem_type, q.esntl_yn, q.plrl_chc_yn , q.lmt_yn, q.etc_add_yn, q.likert_min, q.likert_max , q.likert_min_lbl, q.likert_max_lbl, q.srvy_qitem_lmt , q.reg_id, q.mdfcn_id, CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 WHEN p.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS level, CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN CONCAT('CH', q.srvy_qitem_seq) WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(q.srvy_qitem_seq AS CHAR) WHEN p.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND p.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN CAST(q.srvy_qitem_seq AS CHAR) ELSE CONCAT(p.srvy_qitem_seq, '-', q.srvy_qitem_seq) END AS displayQNo, CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN p.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND p.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN CONCAT('CH', p.srvy_qitem_seq) ELSE CAST(p.srvy_qitem_seq AS CHAR) END AS parentDisplayQNo FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem q LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_qitem p ON q.up_srvy_qitem_oid = p.srvy_qitem_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_qitem gp ON p.up_srvy_qitem_oid = gp.srvy_qitem_oid WHERE q.srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} ORDER BY /* 최상위 그룹핑 (Root Sequence) */ /* 목적: 모든 항목을 '최상위 챕터 또는 독립 문항'의 순번으로 묶음 */ CASE WHEN gp.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN gp.srvy_qitem_seq WHEN p.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN p.srvy_qitem_seq ELSE q.srvy_qitem_seq END ASC, /* 그룹 내 상위 문항 정렬 (Parent Sequence) */ /* 목적: 챕터(Lv.0)를 가장 위로 올리고, 그 다음 Lv.1 문항들을 정렬함 */ CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN gp.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN p.srvy_qitem_seq ELSE q.srvy_qitem_seq END ASC, /* 하위 문항 정렬 (Leaf Sequence) */ /* 목적: 같은 부모 문항을 가진 Lv.2 항목들끼리의 최종 순서를 결정 */ CASE WHEN gp.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN q.srvy_qitem_seq ELSE 0 END ASC
mapper.insert: /* insertSurveyRspd */ INSERT INTO ${schema}.srvy_rspdnt( srvy_oid, user_oid, srvy_rspdnt_nm, srvy_rspdnt_gndr , srvy_rspdnt_inst, srvy_rspdnt_mpno, srvy_rspdnt_eml, srvy_rspdnt_addr , cmpl_yn, cmpl_dt, ip_addr , reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt ) VALUES( #{srvyOid}, #{userOid}, NULLIF(#{userInfo.srvyRspdntNm}, '') , NULLIF(#{userInfo.srvyRspdntGndr}, '') , NULLIF(#{userInfo.srvyRspdntInst}, '') , NULLIF(#{userInfo.srvyRspdntMpno}, '') , NULLIF(#{userInfo.srvyRspdntEml}, '') , NULLIF(#{userInfo.srvyRspdntAddr}, '') , 'Y' , now() , #{ipAddr} , #{regId} , now() , #{mdfcnId} , now() )
